mainHtml:
Home/Solutions/Image-to-3D Model

Generate a Communicable 3D Model Draft from Images

Extract structural outlines from product photos, hand sketches or reference images to generate a 3D model direction for continued communication and evaluation.

Upload Image

Extract Discussable Structure Direction from Images

When a project only has photos, sketches or competitor references, image-to-3D can first organize outline, functional zones and possible assembly relationships.

Generated results are better used as early communication drafts. Critical dimensions, material, loads and interfaces still need confirmation before formal quotation.

Image RecognitionOutline ExtractionStructure DraftDimension Confirmation

Recommended Preparation

  • Product images or sketches
  • Critical dimension range
  • Function and assembly notes
  • Target material or use

Items to Confirm After Image Generation

Images provide shape clues, but manufacturing still requires dimensions, material, assembly and use scenario constraints.

Model DraftOrganize the main outline in the image into a model direction for further confirmation.
Dimension CompletionPrompt the critical dimensions, thicknesses and assembly relationships that customers need to confirm.
Evaluation EntryThe generated model can continue into quotation, DFM or format conversion.

How Image-to-Model Works

Suitable for concept validation, old part replication, appearance reference, no-drawing projects and early product discussion.

01Outline BreakdownIdentify main shape, hole and slot locations, fillets, bosses and assembly areas to form initial structural judgment.
02Dimension Follow-upList required length, width, height, wall thickness, hole diameter, mounting distance and critical fit dimensions.
03Model IterationContinue the draft into DFM, Quick Quote or drawing conversion until it becomes manufacturable information.

Start a 3D Model Draft with an Image

Upload reference images and add use plus critical dimensions so the system can organize the idea into a discussable model direction.

Upload Image
